form.formComment: Resuming after five-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at this track October 30 over 1609m, 12 len behind Kaz Ice Changer with 56.5kg at $33.20. When resuming last campaign ran last of 9 at this track October 30 2024 over 1207m, 23 len behind Cajun Vibes with 55.5kg at $19.70. Sure to be ready to run well.
